verbGlossary.ACCELERATED BY: {source} burn rate increases due to unresolved {target} or regulatory items that extend project duration (e.g., contingency burn rate accelerated by aging open permits).
verbGlossary.ADJUSTED FOR: {source} forecast is revised to account for {target} timeline or regulatory outcome (e.g., cost forecast adjusted for permit cycle time delays).
verbGlossary.ADJUSTS FOR: {source} reallocates funds in response to a {target} change (e.g., budget modification adjusts for new environmental permit conditions).
verbGlossary.ALLOCATES FEE FOR: {source} sets aside dollars to cover {target} fee, inspection fee, or regulatory compliance cost (e.g., budget line item allocates fee for special inspection).
verbGlossary.BILLED AT: {source} is submitted upon issuance of a regulatory {target} (e.g., owner invoice billed at temporary certificate of occupancy for partial occupancy billing).
verbGlossary.BUFFERS AGAINST: {source} reserve provides a monetary cushion against cost impact from a regulatory delay or hold (e.g., contingency buffers against regulatory hold duration costs).
verbGlossary.CODED TO: {source} is assigned to categorize {target}-related expenses for tracking (e.g., cost code coded to trade permit for plumbing or electrical permit fees).
verbGlossary.CONDITIONED ON: {source} release requires a completed regulatory {target} as a prerequisite (e.g., final payment conditioned on certificate of completion confirming all work meets code).
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} plan or budget is limited by the duration or outcome of {target} process (e.g., project budget constrained by permit cycle time that delays mobilization).
verbGlossary.DELAYED BY: {source}is pushed back due to a regulatory hold or {target} delay (e.g., cash flow projection delayed by regulatory hold on site work).
verbGlossary.ESCALATED BY: {source} variance increases as a direct result of regulatory holds adding unanticipated cost (e.g., budget variance escalated by regulatory hold causing extended general conditions).
verbGlossary.FUNDS APPLICATION FOR: {source} provides the funding authority for {target} fees and associated costs (e.g., project budget funds application for building permit).
verbGlossary.HELD PENDING: {source} is withheld until an open {target} or regulatory item is resolved (e.g., retainage held pending closure of open permits at project end).
verbGlossary.ISSUED AFTER: {source} change instrument is issued after {target} identifies required corrective work (e.g., commitment change order issued after AHJ inspection finds code violation).
verbGlossary.PAYS FOR: {source} transaction covers the expense of {target} or testing service (e.g., direct cost pays for third-party testing required by code).
verbGlossary.RELEASED AFTER: {source}cost is authorized for disbursement after {target} is obtained (e.g., committed cost released after building permit allows subcontractor mobilization).
verbGlossary.RELEASED AT: {source} is released upon issuance of a regulatory {target} that confirms project completion or occupancy readiness (e.g., retainage released at certificate of occupancy).
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BEFORE: {source} document must be obtained before a regulatory {target} can be issued (e.g., lien waiver required before certificate of completion is granted).
verbGlossary.RESERVED FOR: {source} allowance or contingency is earmarked to cover anticipated {target} or regulatory costs (e.g., allowance reserved for permit application fees across jurisdictions).
verbGlossary.RESPONDS TO: {source} is made as a direct reaction to a regulatory hold or {target} condition (e.g., budget modification responds to regulatory hold by reallocating schedule contingency).
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} change event is caused by a regulatory review finding, inspection result, or zoning decision (e.g., change event triggered by {target} review requiring additional suppression).
verbGlossary.VERIFIED AGAINST: {source}are verified against {target} results to confirm work completion (e.g., sub invoice verified against AHJ inspection approval before payment).
